items.maltese: Filgħodu nħobb niekol bajda u towst bil-butir.
items.english: In the morning I like to eat an egg and toast with butter.
In the morning I like to have cereal with milk.
In the morning I have coffee and a biscuit.

items.maltese: F'nofsinhar inħobb niekol xi laħam u ħaxix.
items.english: At midday I like to eat some meat and vegetables.
At midday I like to have soup.

items.maltese: Filgħaxija nħobb nieħu xi ħaġa ħafifa.
items.english: In the evening I like to have something light.
In the evening I like to have chicken.
What do you like to eat?
What would you like?
What do you need?
Yesterday I ate two pastizzi.
I like to eat traditional Maltese food.
I like to have beer in the evening.

items.maltese: Inħobb nixrob tazza nbid ma' biċċa laħam.
items.english: I like to drink a glass of wine with a piece of meat.

items.maltese: Mal-ħut inħobb nieħu tazza nbid bajda.
items.english: With fish I like to have a glass of white wine.
During the break I am going to eat ftira biż-żejt.

items.maltese: Xi ħadd irid te jew kafè?
items.english: Does anyone want tea or coffee?
Do you take sugar with tea?
Do you take milk with coffee?
Do you want a biscuit?
It smells nice!
Enjoy your meal.
Same to you.
Ftira biż-żejt is very popular.

items.maltese: L-istuffat tal-fenek huwa ikel tradizzjonali Malti.
items.english: Rabbit stew is traditional Maltese food.
This dish comes from my country.
This dish is a main dish.
This dish has red sauce.

items.maltese: L-ingredjenti għal dan il-platt huma ross, laħam u ħaxix.
items.english: The ingredients for this dish are rice, meat, and vegetables.

items.maltese: Inħobb nitkellem dwar l-ikel favorit tiegħi.
items.english: I like to talk about my favourite food.
